name: python3-toml
title: python3-toml
summary: library for Tom's Obvious, Minimal Language - Python 3.x
description:
library for Tom's Obvious, Minimal Language - Python 3.x
This package provides a Python module which parses and emits TOML. TOML aims
to be a minimal configuration file format that's easy to read due to obvious
semantics. TOML is designed to map unambiguously to a hash table. TOML should
be easy to parse into data structures in a wide variety of languages.
.
This package contains the Python 3.x module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-toml because library for Tom's Obvious, Minimal Language - Python 3.x.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-toml as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-toml with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-toml --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
